meta_description: A fast, searchable listing of South African public-service vacancies, drawn each week from the DPSA Public Service Vacancy Circular.
footer_disclaimer_1: Vacancies are republished from the Department of Public Service and Administration (DPSA) Public Service Vacancy Circular. This is an independent, unofficial index.
footer_disclaimer_2: Always apply to the department named in each advert, by its stated closing date.
mt_notice: This is a machine translation. The English version is authoritative.
listing_description: {total} South African public-service vacancies from {label}. Search and filter by department, province, sector, salary and closing date.
no_js_note: Filters need JavaScript. Every vacancy is listed; use your browser's find (Ctrl/⌘-F).
apply_note: Apply directly to the department, by the closing date, quoting the reference.
dd_tail: . This is an unofficial index; the advert in the circular is authoritative.
about_description: How this independent index of South African public-service vacancies works.
about_p1: Each week (except during December) the Department of Public Service and Administration publishes the Public Service Vacancy Circular: a single, long PDF listing every advertised post across national and provincial government. It is comprehensive, but hard to search, and heavy to open on a phone or a slow connection.
about_p2: This site republishes those same vacancies in a lighter form. We read the latest circular, separate it into individual posts, and present each one as a page you can search, filter and open quickly. The pages are plain and static, so they load on modest connections and work even with JavaScript switched off.
about_p3: This is an independent, unofficial index. We do not receive applications and we are not the employer. Every advert names the department to apply to, a closing date, and a reference number: apply directly to that department, by that date, quoting that reference. Where anything here differs from the official circular, the circular is correct.
about_source_lead: The source is the DPSA newsroom:
archive_description: Browse past weekly Public Service Vacancy Circulars.
archive_intro: Every weekly circular we have processed, newest first. Older adverts have almost certainly closed; they are kept for reference.
title_404: Page not found · Public Service Vacancies
e404_heading: We could not find that page
e404_body: The vacancy may have moved to the archive, or the link may be old. Start again from the latest circular.
